cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out who ends up with which ball after these swaps. There are five players: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored ball. The problem is asking what color ball Alice has at the end after all these swaps. Let me try to track each swap step by step. First, let me list the starting positions so I don't get confused. - Alice: black - Bob: brown - Claire: blue - Dave: white - Eve: green Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each one step by step. First swap: Dave and Eve swap balls. So Dave, who had white, now has green (Eve's previous ball), and Eve now has white (Dave's previous ball). Let me update the list: - Alice: black - Bob: brown - Claire: blue - Dave: green - Eve: white Second swap: Bob and Claire swap balls. Bob had brown, Claire had blue. After swapping: - Bob: blue - Claire: brown Updating the list: - Alice: black - Bob: blue - Claire: brown - Dave: green - Eve: white Third swap: Claire and Alice swap balls. Claire has brown, Alice has black. After swapping: - Claire: black - Alice: brown So now the list is: - Alice: brown - Bob: blue - Claire: black - Dave: green - Eve: white Fourth swap: Dave and Eve swap
